comments.text:
How to fix the Pro Bowl

1. Play the Pro Bowl AFTER the Superbowl.
2. Go back to 11 v 11 tackle, pads-on football.
3. Play in a different city each year.
4. Better AFC & NFC uniforms.
5. Play on a 100 yard field.
